creator: bjohnson@gainesville.usda.ufl.edu
text:
At http://www.freebsd.org/news/, at the bottom of the 
page, the last paragraph reads:

"This page list user visible changes at the FreeBSD Web Server."

The word "list" should be "lists".

Fix: 

Change as described above.

Sorry I don't have resources to submit this as a change to the SGML.
How-To-Repeat: View the URL.
